components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: chacha20
components.description: The ChaCha20 stream cipher (RFC 8439) implemented in pure Rust using traits from the RustCrypto `cipher` crate, with optional architecture-specific hardware acceleration (AVX2, SSE2). Additionally provides the ChaCha8, ChaCha12, XChaCha20, XChaCha12 and XChaCha8 stream ciphers, and also optional rand_core-compatible RNGs based on those ciphers.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: chacha20poly1305
components.description: Pure Rust implementation of the ChaCha20Poly1305 Authenticated Encryption with Additional Data Cipher (RFC 8439) with optional architecture-specific hardware acceleration. Also contains implementations of the XChaCha20Poly1305 extended nonce variant of ChaCha20Poly1305, and the reduced-round ChaCha8Poly1305 and ChaCha12Poly1305 lightweight variants.

components.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
components.name: tar
components.description: A Rust implementation of a TAR file reader and writer. This library does not currently handle compression, but it is abstract over all I/O readers and writers. Additionally, great lengths are taken to ensure that the entire contents are never required to be entirely resident in memory all at once.

components.name: toml
components.description: A native Rust encoder and decoder of TOML-formatted files and streams. Provides implementations of the standard Serialize/Deserialize traits for TOML data to facilitate deserializing and serializing Rust structures.

components.name: typenum
components.description: Typenum is a Rust library for type-level numbers evaluated at     compile time. It currently supports bits, unsigned integers, and signed     integers. It also provides a type-level array of type-level numbers, but its     implementation is incomplete.
